description_long: This is a full-sized axe featuring a long, slightly curved handle with a predominantly black and yellow color scheme. The handle appears to be made of a composite or fiberglass material, providing both durability and a comfortable grip. The axe head is robust and painted red, with a silver metallic cutting edge and a flat poll on the opposite side, suitable for striking. The blade is wide and wedge-shaped, designed for chopping wood or similar tasks, and the transition between the handle and the head is reinforced for safety. The overall design is modern, with no visible decorative engravings or branding. This tool is commonly found in urban environments such as garages, maintenance sheds, or emergency response kits.
description: A modern axe with a long black and yellow handle and a red, wedge-shaped metal blade with a silver edge.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black and yellow handle and the red axe head with a silver edge.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad, red blade and the narrow profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the axe head and the ergonomic curve of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved composite handle, black with yellow midsection, ergonomic grip, oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single wedge-shaped blade, red with a silver cutting edge, flat poll, no beard, functional design.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite mounting, likely molded or securely bonded to the head.
